subcodes.first_line: O dervish! Offer thy life in the path of the Beloved, yet seek thou no recompense, for this would be contrary to the way of true lovers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای درویش عوض جان در ره جانان بباز ولی عوض مطلب زیرا مخالف روش عاشقان و رای
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
